news.t: Inspire Growth ETF (NYSE: GLRY) Celebrates 5-Year Anniversary and 5-Star Morningstar Rating
Inspire Investing Announces Fund Name Changes to Better Reflect Growth and Capital Appreciation Strategies
Inspire Momentum ETF (GLRY) Receives Prestigious 5-Star Overall Morningstar Rating™
Inspire ETFs Reports Expense Ratio Reductions for 7 Funds

holdings.infoBox: GLRY is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 7.66%, Monolithic Power Systems at 5.49%, Curtiss-Wright at 4.92%, Amphenol at 4.69%, and Broadcom at 4.64%.

overview.description: The Inspire Growth ETF (GLRY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund seeks to maximize growth and outperform its benchmark by actively selecting US mid-cap stocks that are screened for their alignment in biblical values. GLRY was launched on Dec 7, 2020 and is issued by Inspire.
